Public Prediction Cards

A public SETA view of directional model context. Cards summarize lean, confidence, and historical behavior by asset. They are for review and context, not trade instructions, price targets, or investment advice.

How to read these cards: Lean shows directional model context. Confidence is relative to that lean, not a guarantee. Historical accuracy shows how often prior signals in this asset/context were directionally correct over time.

SETA cards are context, not advice. They summarize model and sentiment conditions in a public-safe format, not trade instructions, price targets, or investment advice. Confidence is a ranked context indicator based on historical model behavior, not a guaranteed probability. Cards are shown only after automated quality and display-readiness checks.
